title: Burg Wachter CB02BK Money 5020 Cash Box - Black, 8 Inch
description: From the manufacturer No Keys to Lose Keep your money safe with our large selection of home & office cash boxes. The Sterling combination cash box is an extremely popular cash box as it does not require a key to open it making it ideal for the office where staff don't need a key to obtain access and it is available in a range of colours and two different sizes. Available in different colours and sizes Sterling Combination Cash Box in blue This cash box is available in two different sizes, the 8" and 10" - both come with a removable partitioned tray. Grey Combination Cash Box from Sterling Again this cash box comes with a removable partitioned tray as well as a strong recessed metal handle. This is also available in two sizes 8" and 10". Sterling Red Cash Box with combination In a matt finish with rounded corners, this cash box is available in two different sizes 8" and 10". It also has a strong recessed metal handle and a removable partitioned tray. If you are no good at remembering numbers then why not try the lock version Keep your valuables safe and secure with this reliable cash box. Ideal for home or office use designed to store petty cash, coins and receipts and secured by a lock with a recessed handle and a removable partition tray. Available in four different sizes and colours. If you are no good at remembering numbers then why not try the lock version Keep your valuables safe and secure with this reliable cash box. Sterling Blue 6" Cash Box Sterling Black 8" Cash Box Sterling Red 10" Cash Box Sterling Grey 12" Cash Box Then there is the GBP coin tray version This cash box is just available in a 10" version but there are the four colours, black, blue, grey and red. This cash box has an integral coin counter and can hold notes too. It is constructed in a strong steel finish with a powder paint coating matt finish and has a recessed handle. Burg-Wachter UK The success of Burg-Wachter is based on the excellent quality of our products and the high sense of responsibility of our staff. This combination results in products that meet the need for safety and security at the highest level. Security meets style Quality meets value Tradition meets trends Sterling Part of the worldwide BURG-WACHTER group Sterling products are equal to the best in the market. Sterling is a brand of Burg-Wächter one of the largest manufacturers of security products in the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions.
